title: Former SU coach’s house in DeWitt sells for $1.35 million; plus 90 other home sales
summary: Real estate market report covering 91 Onondaga County home sales for the week of June 28–July 4, 2026, with the highest sale price of $1.35 million for a DeWitt property formerly owned by former Syracuse University basketball coach Adrian Autry. This market data may inform economic development and housing trend analysis for the region.
processing_notes: Article is a real estate market report with limited direct municipal governance relevance
No City of Syracuse departments or policies referenced
Adrian Autry affiliation with SU is contextual but not operationally significant to CIO
Data source is county-level clerk records, not city systems
Could be tangentially relevant to housing/economic development trend monitoring
